sentences.english: I love sharing food at restaurants.
sentences.korean: 식당에서 음식 나눠 먹는 걸 좋아해요.

sentences.english: You get to try so many different dishes that way.
sentences.korean: 그러면 다양한 요리를 많이 맛볼 수 있거든요.

sentences.english: I don't like sharing my food, honestly.
sentences.korean: 솔직히 음식 나누는 걸 안 좋아해요.

sentences.english: I ordered it because I want to eat it all myself.
In Korean culture, sharing food is very common.
sentences.korean: 한국 문화에서 음식 나누기는 매우 흔해요.

sentences.english: We always order dishes for the table, not just for one person.
sentences.korean: 한 사람이 아니라 항상 테이블 전체용으로 주문해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
